title: joins fail in the presence of nulls
poc: create table foo (a string, b int);
create table bar (a string, b int);
select foo.a,foo.b,bar.b,bar.a from foo join bar on foo.b=bar.b;
key_bug_features: joins fail when null values are present
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id int, name string, value int);
CREATE TABLE test2 (id int, description string, amount int);
SELECT test1.name, test1.value, test2.amount FROM test1 LEFT JOIN test2 ON test1.value = test2.amount;
